articles.title: Shanto ton, Mominul fifty frustrate Pakistan in second session of Mirpur Test
articles.description: Shanto made 101 before falling just moments before the tea break

articles.title: Dhumal: IPL's anti-corruption unit has flagged 'anomalies' in a report to BCCI
articles.description: BCCI secretary also said that in some cases, team owners and officials have been mingling with players in areas where it is not allowed

articles.title: Why being Pakistan head coach could be the perfect role for Sarfaraz
articles.description: The former Pakistan captain waltzes into his new role with relatively little experience in coaching, but a strong bond with Test captain Shan Masood and an acute understanding of the game

articles.title: Domestic player among four charged in BCB's corruption probe
articles.description: One person has also received a lifetime ban as probe into BPL and NCL brings the first charges since the BCB integrity unit was formed in 2025

articles.title: Marcus North set to be named as England Men's selector
articles.description: Former Australia batter and current Durham director of cricket expected to be confirmed ahead of NZ Test series

articles.title: Former India Under-19 cricketer Amanpreet Singh Gill dies at 36
articles.description: Amanpreet Singh Gill played youth one-dayers and a three-day Test in 2007, touring England, Malaysia and Sri Lanka with the India Under-19 team in that period

articles.title: India to host Zimbabwe for maiden women's bilateral series
articles.description: Tour comprises three T20Is and three ODIs in October

articles.title: Royals sale controversy: outcome doesn't 'reflect a level-playing field', says Somani-led group
articles.description: Somani-led consortium calls it "surprising and disappointing" that Royals went to the Mittal-led consortium after the deal appeared to have been sealed

articles.title: Hardie owns big stage to help Zalmi lift second PSL title
articles.description: Australia allrounder took four wickets and followed up with unbeaten half-century to help see off Kingsmen

articles.title: New twist in Rajasthan Royals ownership as Indian businessman Lakshmi Mittal acquires franchise
articles.description: A US-based consortium had won the bid for RR in March but their deal hasn't gone through

articles.title: Viewership reach for IPL 2026 soars to 1.06 billion, connected TV emerges as fastest-growing platform
articles.description: Average match reach has grown by 6% over last year.

articles.title: IPL likely to expand from 74 to 94 games from 2028, says league chairman Arun Dhumal
articles.description: IPL chairman Arun Dhumal said that from 2028 onwards, the league could be played in a proper home-away format. Each team will play nine home games and as many away games in a season.

articles.title: BCCI set to appoint Shreyas Iyer as India's T20I captain replacing Suryakumar Yadav
articles.description: Suryakumar's batting form has been a concern ever since 2024.

articles.title: BCCI issues honey-trap warning to IPL teams, lays strict rules over hotel room access
articles.description: Players and team officials will not be allowed any person in their hotel rooms without prior intimation and due approval.

articles.title: Babar Azam set to miss first Test against Bangladesh with knee injury
articles.description: The Pakistan batter had led the Peshawar Zalmi to the 2026 PSL.

articles.title: MS Dhoni revealed highest taxpayer in Bihar and Jharkhand combined in financial year of 2025-26
articles.description: The tax authorities collected as much as INR 20,000 crore in taxes, with more than 60 per cent coming from the state of Jharkhand alone.

articles.title: 'KSCA sought 10,000 extra tickets' - BCCI clarifies why Bengaluru lost IPL 2026 final hosting rights
articles.description: The M Chinnaswamy Stadium was reported to host the final and one playoff in the 2026 edition.
